subject: DevOps
title: The DevOps Engineer Role
description: A fast breakdown of The DevOps Engineer Role for builders.

hook.text: Job boards list 'DevOps Engineer' everywhere. But DevOps is a culture, not a job title. Contradiction?

buildup.text: In practice, DevOps engineers build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure, and monitoring.

discovery.text: They bridge dev and ops. They write code, manage servers, and automate everything in between.

twist.text: The best DevOps engineers make themselves unnecessary. They build platforms that empower all developers.

climax.text: Platform engineering is the natural evolution. Instead of one hero, build self-service tools for everyone.

punchline.text: DevOps is a culture. The engineer builds the platform for it.

quiz.question: What is the natural evolution of the DevOps engineer role?
